title: Salty Crumbly Tunisian Pork Shoulder Tagine
description: A deep, savory tagine featuring caramelized, plant-based pork shoulder with aromatic spices, thickened tomato sauce, and a crunchy breadcrumb topping.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a deep skillet or tagine over medium‑high heat; sear the plant‑based pork shoulder pieces until browned on all sides, about 3‑4 minutes. Remove the pork and set aside.
In the same pan, add the remaining 1 tbsp oil, then add the sliced onion. Sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes, then add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, cinnamon, salt, and pepper; cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the crushed tomatoes and vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer.
Return the pork to the pan, cover partially, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for 35‑40 minutes until the pork is tender and the sauce has thickened.
After simmering, sprinkle the toasted breadcrumbs evenly over the top, cover again, and cook for an additional 5 minutes to toast the crumbs and form a crumbly crust.
Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary. Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh coriander.
